create table meta_ingestion_pl (
	source_container NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
	source_folders NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
	target_container NVARCHAR(50) NULL,
	target_folders NVARCHAR(50) NULL
)

INSERT INTO meta_ingestion_pl (source_container, source_folders, target_container, target_folders)
SELECT 'retail-data', 'customers', 'bronze', 'customers' UNION ALL
SELECT 'retail-data', 'sales', 'bronze', 'sales' UNION ALL
SELECT 'retail-data', 'sales_orders', 'bronze', 'sales_orders';
GO

select * from meta_ingestion_pl
